transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I've had this dull ache in my chest since this morning, and I get short of breath walking to the mailbox.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. On a scale of one to ten, how would you rate the discomfort right now?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe a five. It comes and goes, but the breathlessness is new for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood. Have you had any fever or cough along with this?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No fever, just some tightness and, yeah, trouble catching my breath.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I'll go ahead and note that for your file. Let's get you scheduled with your primary care provider, Dr. Lansing, for a follow-up.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, whenever they have an opening this week is fine.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I have Thursday at 2:15pm or Friday at 9:45am with Dr. Lansing. Which works better?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're booked for Friday at 9:45am. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
